title: Create VISION.md
description: VISION.md does not exist. Create it to capture the product vision for AgenticShell: a deterministic Unix-like shell for AI agents running in sandboxed environments. This directly closes the vision gap 'VISION.md does not exist -- product vision only implicitly defined via ARCHITECTURE.md'. Acceptance: VISION.md exists with product vision, target users (AI agents), key differentiators (deterministic, sandboxed, cross-env), and roadmap.
